name: Distinctive Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat salad oil and black pepper in a large skillet.
2. Add meat to the skillet and brown on all sides, occasionally stirring.
3. Add garlic and salt, then add meat broth. Cover and cook for about 1.5 hours or until the meat is tender.
4. In a separate bowl, blend together cornstarch, soy sauce, and water.
5. Pour the mixture into the skillet and stir well to combine.
6. Add English peas and diced pimento. Continue cooking until thickened.
7. Serve over fluffy rice.
